# NeuroClaw Skills

Gemini agents can use these mirrored NeuroClaw skills. Use the skill body as task-specific guidance, and use NeuroClaw MCP tools such as list_skills and run_skill_script when a script-backed skill needs execution.

- access: Manage Discord channel access — approve pairings, edit allowlists, set DM/group policy. Use when the user asks to pair, approve someone, check who's allowed, or change policy for the Discord channel. (marketplace) -> access.md
- access-kv-key-explicit-namespace: Explicitly specify the namespace when accessing a Key-Value store key to resolve 'key does not exist' errors in Kestra. (project) -> access-kv-key-explicit-namespace.md
- add-composite-index-for-query-performance: Add a composite index to a database table to optimize query performance, especially for filtered and ordered results. (project) -> add-composite-index-for-query-performance.md
- add-gitlab-ci-cd-variables: Add CI/CD variables to a GitLab repository for use in pipeline configurations. (project) -> add-gitlab-ci-cd-variables.md
- add-schema-to-env-and-reload-service: Automates adding a new schema name to an environment configuration file and selectively reloading a specific service to apply the changes. (project) -> add-schema-to-env-and-reload-service.md
- add-supabase-env-vars-netlify: Add Supabase project URL and public anon key to Netlify's build environment variables to resolve 'supabaseKey is required' errors during deployment. (project) -> add-supabase-env-vars-netlify.md
- adjust-ci-npm-no-lockfile: Adjust CI/CD workflows to prevent failures when a package manager's lock file is not committed, by modifying caching and installation commands. (project) -> adjust-ci-npm-no-lockfile.md
- adjust-dark-theme-for-warmth: Adjusts a dark theme's color palette to convey warmth and approachability, moving away from a cold, technical aesthetic. (project) -> adjust-dark-theme-for-warmth.md
- agent-development: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an agent", "add an agent", "write a subagent", "agent frontmatter", "when to use description", "agent examples", "agent tools", "agent colors", "autonomous agent", or needs guidance on agent structure, system prompts, triggering conditions, or agent development best practices for Claude Code plugins. (marketplace) -> agent-development.md
- agent-self-extension-forge-hive-mind: Procedure for an agent to extend its capabilities by searching existing knowledge, authoring a new skill with Forge, and documenting it in Hive Mind. (project) -> agent-self-extension-forge-hive-mind.md
- analyze-github-repos: Analyze a list of GitHub repositories to audit their structure, tech stack, workflows, and overall health. (project) -> analyze-github-repos.md
- analyze-github-repositories: Analyze one or more GitHub repositories for structure, branching, CI/CD, documentation, and overall health. (project) -> analyze-github-repositories.md
- analyze-github-repository: Analyze a GitHub repository by examining its structure, tech stack, CI/CD, branching, deployment, package files, README, and overall health. (project) -> analyze-github-repository.md
- api-admin: API administration scripts for LiteLLM, Picsur, and other services (project) -> api-admin.md
- api-error-translation-and-client-switching: Implement robust API error handling with specific error translation, retry suppression, and conditional switching between API clients for improved reliability and logging. (project) -> api-error-translation-and-client-switching.md
- archive-github-repo: Archive a GitHub repository to preserve its history and links without it appearing in your active list. (project) -> archive-github-repo.md
- audit-repo-missing-elements: Identifies common missing elements in a repository's structure and configuration, such as CI/CD, branching, documentation, and essential config files. (project) -> audit-repo-missing-elements.md
- auto-update-config-on-db-schema-add: Automatically monitors a database for new schemas and updates a service's configuration and restarts it when new schemas are detected, while ignoring a predefined list. (project) -> auto-update-config-on-db-schema-add.md
- batch-update-repo-descriptions: Batch updates repository descriptions from a provided list, allowing for specific overrides or exclusions for individual repositories. (project) -> batch-update-repo-descriptions.md
- brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation. (plugin) -> brainstorming.md
- brandkit: Premium brand-kit image generation skill for creating high-end brand-guidelines boards, logo systems, identity decks, and visual-world presentations. Trained for minimalist, cinematic, editorial, dark-tech, luxury, cultural, security, gaming, developer-tool, and consumer-app brand systems. Optimized for intentional logo concepting, refined composition, sparse typography, strong symbolic meaning, premium mockups, art-directed imagery, and flexible grid layouts. (installed) -> brandkit.md
- build-mcp-app: This skill should be used when the user wants to build an "MCP app", add "interactive UI" or "widgets" to an MCP server, "render components in chat", build "MCP UI resources", make a tool that shows a "form", "picker", "dashboard" or "confirmation dialog" inline in the conversation, or mentions "apps SDK" in the context of MCP. Use AFTER the build-mcp-server skill has settled the deployment model, or when the user already knows they want UI widgets. (marketplace) -> build-mcp-app.md
- build-mcp-server: This skill should be used when the user asks to "build an MCP server", "create an MCP", "make an MCP integration", "wrap an API for Claude", "expose tools to Claude", "make an MCP app", or discusses building something with the Model Context Protocol. It is the entry point for MCP server development — it interrogates the user about their use case, determines the right deployment model (remote HTTP, MCPB, local stdio), picks a tool-design pattern, and hands off to specialized skills. (marketplace) -> build-mcp-server.md
- build-mcpb: This skill should be used when the user wants to "package an MCP server", "bundle an MCP", "make an MCPB", "ship a local MCP server", "distribute a local MCP", discusses ".mcpb files", mentions bundling a Node or Python runtime with their MCP server, or needs an MCP server that interacts with the local filesystem, desktop apps, or OS and must be installable without the user having Node/Python set up. (marketplace) -> build-mcpb.md
- build-simple-client-dashboard: Quickly build a simple, live-data dashboard using plain HTML, vanilla JavaScript, and a direct client-side database connection. (project) -> build-simple-client-dashboard.md
- canvas: Asia's design studio. Use when the user asks for design work — mockups, pitch decks, hero sections, posters, landing pages, wireframes, brand explorations. Generates polished HTML artifacts that render in a sandboxed iframe, with a 5-dimension self-critique. The /canvas dashboard tab is the workspace view; this skill is the engine both surfaces consume. (project) -> canvas.md
- cardputer-buddy: Iterate on the Cardputer-Adv MicroPython app bundle (Claude Buddy, Snake, Hello) after the device is already provisioned via m5-onboard. Use when the user wants to add a new app, push a single changed .py without re-flashing, watch device serial logs, or run a one-shot REPL command. Trigger on "add an app", "push to the cardputer", "tail the device", "run on the device", or follow-up work after /maker-setup. (marketplace) -> cardputer-buddy.md
- categorize-github-repos: Categorize GitHub repositories into active, archived, or deleted based on their status and value. (project) -> categorize-github-repos.md
- choose-website-host: Decide between GitHub/GitLab Pages and Netlify for website hosting based on project requirements like build steps, static content, and advanced features. (project) -> choose-website-host.md
- claude-automation-recommender: Analyze a codebase and recommend Claude Code automations (hooks, subagents, skills, plugins, MCP servers). Use when user asks for automation recommendations, wants to optimize their Claude Code setup, mentions improving Claude Code workflows, asks how to first set up Claude Code for a project, or wants to know what Claude Code features they should use. (marketplace) -> claude-automation-recommender.md
- claude-md-improver: Audit and improve CLAUDE.md files in repositories. Use when user asks to check, audit, update, improve, or fix CLAUDE.md files. Scans for all CLAUDE.md files, evaluates quality against templates, outputs quality report, then makes targeted updates. Also use when the user mentions "CLAUDE.md maintenance" or "project memory optimization". (marketplace) -> claude-md-improver.md
- codebase-spec-verification: Verifies a technical specification against a live codebase, identifying correctness issues, gaps, and assumptions. (project) -> codebase-spec-verification.md
- command-development: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create a slash command", "add a command", "write a custom command", "define command arguments", "use command frontmatter", "organize commands", "create command with file references", "interactive command", "use AskUserQuestion in command", or needs guidance on slash command structure, YAML frontmatter fields, dynamic arguments, bash execution in commands, user interaction patterns, or command development best practices for Claude Code. - configure-netlify-spa-redirects: Configure Netlify to correctly handle client-side routing for Single Page Applications (SPAs) by redirecting all non-file paths to the main entry point. (project) -> configure-netlify-spa-redirects.md
- configure-postgrest-new-schema: Configure PostgREST to expose a new database schema in a self-hosted Supabase deployment. (project) -> configure-postgrest-new-schema.md

- handle-long-chat-operations: Implement a robust strategy for chat bots to manage long-running operations, preventing timeouts and ensuring final message delivery. (project) -> handle-long-chat-operations.md
- handle-transient-http-errors-with-retry-and-circuit-breaker: Implement a robust strategy to handle transient HTTP 5xx errors using retries, exponential backoff, and a circuit breaker pattern with fallback routing. (project) -> handle-transient-http-errors-with-retry-and-circuit-breaker.md
- harden-api-endpoints: Implement robust input validation, error handling, and dependency management in API endpoints to prevent crashes and provide clear client feedback. (project) -> harden-api-endpoints.md
- high-end-visual-design: Teaches the AI to design like a high-end agency. Defines the exact fonts, spacing, shadows, card structures, and animations that make a website feel expensive. Blocks all the common defaults that make AI designs look cheap or generic. (installed) -> high-end-visual-design.md
- hook-development: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create a hook", "add a PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop hook", "validate tool use", "implement prompt-based hooks", "use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}", "set up event-driven automation", "block dangerous commands", or mentions hook events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SubagentStop, SessionStart, SessionEnd, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, Notification). Provides comprehensive guidance for creating and implementing Claude Code plugin hooks with focus on advanced prompt-based hooks API. (marketplace) -> hook-development.md
- htpasswd-generator: Generate or verify Apache-compatible htpasswd bcrypt hashes (e.g. for nginx/Apache basic auth). (project) -> htpasswd-generator.md
- huashu-design: 花叔Design（Huashu-Design）——用HTML做高保真原型、交互Demo、幻灯片、动画、设计变体探索+设计方向顾问+专家评审的一体化设计能力。HTML是工具不是媒介，根据任务embody不同专家（UX设计师/动画师/幻灯片设计师/原型师），避免web design tropes。触发词：做原型、设计Demo、交互原型、HTML演示、动画Demo、设计变体、hi-fi设计、UI mockup、prototype、设计探索、做个HTML页面、做个可视化、app原型、iOS原型、移动应用mockup、导出MP4、导出GIF、60fps视频、设计风格、设计方向、设计哲学、配色方案、视觉风格、推荐风格、选个风格、做个好看的、评审、好不好看、review this design。**主干能力**：Junior Designer工作流（先给假设+reasoning+placeholder再迭代）、反AI slop清单、React+Babel最佳实践、Tweaks变体切换、Speaker Notes演示、Starter Components（幻灯片外壳/变体画布/动画引擎/设备边框）、App原型专属守则（默认从Wikimedia/Met/Unsplash取真图、每台iPhone包AppPhone状态管理器可交互、交付前跑Playwright点击测试）、Playwright验证、HTML动画→MP4/GIF视频导出（25fps基础 + 60fps插帧 + palette优化GIF + 6首场景化BGM + 自动fade）。**需求模糊时的Fallback**：设计方向顾问模式——从5流派×20种设计哲学（Pentagram信息建筑/Field.io运动诗学/Kenya Hara东方极简/Sagmeister实验先锋等）推荐3个差异化方向，展示24个预制showcase（8场景×3风格），并行生成3个视觉Demo让用户选。**交付后可选**：专家级5维度评审（哲学一致性/视觉层级/细节执行/功能性/创新性各打10分+修复清单）。 (installed) -> huashu-design.md
- humanize-text: Two-pass AI text humanizer — GPT-5.4-mini analysis + model rewrite via VoidAI. Removes AI-sounding patterns and rewrites text to sound naturally human. (project) -> humanize-text.md
